settings.deviceSync.title: Device sync

settings.dangerZone.title: Danger zone
settings.dangerZone.primaryKey.label: Primary key
settings.dangerZone.primaryKey.descripti: Root key that encrypts all connections. Back it up to restore access on a new device.
settings.dangerZone.primaryKey.confirm.m: This replaces your current primary key.
Your API key will also be updated.
{count, plural, one {# machine} other {# machines}} will be added.
settings.dangerZone.primaryKey.error.mis: Invalid backup file: missing masterSecret field
settings.dangerZone.primaryKey.error.par: Invalid backup file: could not parse JSON
settings.dangerZone.rotate.label: Rotate master secret
settings.dangerZone.rotate.description: Generates a new master secret, tombstones the old mailbox, and wipes the local machine list. Every other PWA and every agent must re-pair.
settings.dangerZone.rotate.success: Identity rotated. Re-pair all other devices with the new QR.
settings.dangerZone.rotate.confirm.title: Rotate master secret?
settings.dangerZone.rotate.confirm.messa:
This generates a new master secret and permanently tombstones the current one.
All other PWAs stop syncing until you re-pair them, and every agent auto-closes its pairing.
settings.machines.title: Machines
settings.machines.empty: No machines added yet. Add one from the home page.
settings.machines.remove.confirm.title: Remove machine?
settings.machines.remove.confirm.message: Remove "{nickname}" from your machine list. You can re-pair it later.
settings.machines.edit.title: Edit machine
settings.machines.edit.nickname.label: Nickname
archivedSessions.title: Archived tasks
archivedSessions.unknownProject: Project path unknown — connect to this machine first.
machineInfo.fallback.title: Machine
machineInfo.projects.title: Projects
machineInfo.projects.empty: No projects on this machine yet.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notifications.description: Get alerted when a task needs your attention.
settings.notifications.unsupported: Push notifications aren't available in this browser.
settings.notifications.unsupported.brows: This browser doesn't support Web Push. Try a recent Chrome, Firefox, or Safari.
settings.notifications.unsupported.iosSt: On iOS, push only works after adding this site to your Home Screen (Share → Add to Home Screen), then opening it from the icon.
settings.notifications.unsupported.noVap: Push isn't configured for this deployment (missing VITE_VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY at build time). Ask the operator to set the VAPID key in CI and redeploy.
settings.notifications.denied: Notifications are blocked. Update the permission in your browser settings to re-enable.
settings.apiKey.title: Anthropic API key
settings.apiKey.storageNote: Your API key is stored on your device and sent securely to your machines when connected.
settings.apiKey.help.toggle: How to get an API key
settings.apiKey.help.whyTitle: Why is an API key required?
settings.apiKey.help.whyBody: Quicksave uses Claude AI to generate commit message summaries from your diffs. Claude Pro/Max subscriptions only work with the official Claude apps. Third-party tools like Quicksave require a separate API key with usage-based billing.
settings.apiKey.help.howTitle: How to get your API key:
settings.apiKey.help.step2: Sign in or create an Anthropic account
settings.apiKey.help.step3: Click "Create Key" and give it a name
settings.apiKey.help.step5: Paste it above and click Save
settings.language.title: Language
newSession.title: New Task
newSession.sandbox.help.title: About sandbox mode
newSession.sandbox.help.onBody: Adds a `SandboxBash` MCP tool to the agent. Commands run through it execute inside a kernel-level sandbox (sandbox-exec on macOS, bwrap on Linux) that confines writes to this project's directory, so they can be auto-approved without per-command prompts. The agent's other tools (Bash, Edit, Write) are unaffected by this toggle.
newSession.sandbox.help.offBody: Removes `SandboxBash`. The agent only has the regular Bash tool, which prompts you for permission on every shell call. Pick this when the task needs many shell commands that wouldn't fit inside the sandbox.
newSession.hint: Type a message below to start the task
codexLogin.banner.title: Codex is not signed in
codexLogin.banner.body: Connect a ChatGPT or OpenAI account so Codex can run on this machine. You can complete sign-in on your phone.
codexLogin.modal.title: Connect Codex
codexLogin.modal.instructions: Finish sign-in on any device — no need to be at the machine running Quicksave.
codexLogin.modal.step1: Open this link in a browser:
codexLogin.modal.waiting: Waiting for you to approve on the browser…
sessionStatus.sandbox.titleOn: Sandbox on — writes restricted to this project
sessionStatus.contextWindow.title: Context window — change applies live (auto-compact retargets next turn)

pair.invite.title: Add new device
pair.invite.expired.message: This QR / link expired without any device completing the pairing. Generate a new one.
pair.invite.copyHint: Or copy this link and paste it on the new device
pair.invite.candidatesDetected: Detected {count, plural, one {# candidate device} other {# candidate devices}}
pair.invite.sasPrompt: Enter the 6 codes shown on the new device
pair.invite.sas.noMatch: No matching device. Double-check the 6 codes shown on the new device.
pair.invite.sas.collision: Suspicious collision detected (multiple candidates matched the same code). Pairing aborted.
pair.invite.sent: Sent the key to the new device. It should sync momentarily.
pair.scan.title: Link to existing device
pair.scan.instructions: Open "Add new device" on the main device, then point your camera at its QR code.
pair.scan.scanning: Center the QR in the frame
pair.scan.error.permission: Camera permission denied. Allow camera access in your browser settings and try again.
pair.scan.error.https: Camera requires an HTTPS context. Use a production domain or localhost.

join.waiting.prompt: Enter the 6 codes below on the original device to finish pairing:
join.waiting.sasRemaining: {seconds}s remaining (a new code is generated automatically on expiry)
join.waiting.waitingConfirmation: Waiting for confirmation on the original device…

join.error.missingK: Invitation link is missing the k= key parameter
